name: Feature Scaler
shortDescription: Scale numeric columns using StandardScaler or MinMaxScaler
description: Scales numeric columns so they are on the same range. StandardScaler makes mean=0 and std=1. MinMaxScaler squishes values between 0 and 1. Required before most ML models.
inputDescription: Dataset with numeric columns to scale

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this node in the pipeline

method.label: Scaling Method
method.description: StandardScaler: mean=0, std=1. MinMaxScaler: values between 0 and 1.

columns.label: Columns to Scale
columns.description: Comma-separated column names to scale. Leave blank to scale all numeric columns automatically.

outputDescription: Dataset with specified numeric columns scaled
